system.concept: The Tall Ladies — powerful tree spirits, kin to Danu, each bound to her tree.
system.description: The Tall Ladies, Daughters-of-Seed, the Slow Sisters: these are the titles given to the Brennauwed, powerful tree spirits and, if you believe them, kin to Danu herself. Each is tethered to a single tree. The younger ones can roam, but the older a Brennauwed is, the more bound she is to her tree — from the wandering glasbren, to the motherly birdwaig, to the ancient and terrible hennain.
